clauses.text: This Agreement is entered into between [ASSIGNOR_NAME] ("Assignor") and [ASSIGNEE_NAME] ("Assignee").
"Transferred Works" means [WORK_DESCRIPTION], created by the Assignor.
The Assignor assigns to the Assignee all right, title, and interest in and to the Transferred Works, including all copyright and related economic rights, effective upon [ASSIGNMENT_EFFECTIVE_DATE].

The Assignor warrants that it is the sole author and owner of the Transferred Works, that the Transferred Works do not infringe the rights of any third party, and that the Assignor has full authority to make this assignment.
The Assignor shall indemnify the Assignee against any loss arising from a breach of the Assignor Warranty Clause, up to a maximum of [INDEMNITY_CAP].

Where moral rights in the Transferred Works are not transferable under applicable law, the Assignor waives, to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, the right to object to modification of the Transferred Works by the Assignee, without waiving the right of attribution unless [ATTRIBUTION_WAIVED] indicates otherwise.
The assignment under the Transfer of Rights Clause is exclusive, and the Assignor shall not grant any other party rights in the Transferred Works.
The assignment under the Transfer of Rights Clause applies worldwide and for the full duration of copyright protection available under applicable law.

This assignment extends to any work the Assignor creates within [FUTURE_WORKS_CATEGORY] during the period ending [FUTURE_WORKS_CUTOFF_DATE], provided such work is reasonably identifiable as falling within that category.
In addition to any lump-sum payment, the Assignee shall pay the Assignor a royalty of [ROYALTY_RATE] of [ROYALTY_BASE], payable [ROYALTY_PAYMENT_FREQUENCY].
In consideration for the assignment, the Assignee shall pay the Assignor [TOTAL_VALUE], payable via [PAYMENT_METHOD].
This Agreement shall be governed by [APPLICABLE_LAW]. Any dispute shall be submitted to [DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM] before litigation, except where interim injunctive relief is required.

The Parties have executed this Agreement as of [SIGNATURE_DATE]. Ambiguity: "Transferred Works" anchored to explicit Dynamic Field, not generic language. Duplication: none — Assignment vs. Moral Rights vs. Royalties address distinct rights. Loophole closed: added indemnity cap to prevent unlimited assignor exposure. Contradiction: Moral Rights Clause conditioned on "not transferable under applicable law" so it never conflicts with jurisdictions treating moral rights as freely assignable. Missing protection: added Guarantees Block after risk #3/#4. Complexity: future-works and royalties isolated as Conditional Blocks rather than cluttering the core Assignment Clause. Enforceability: every obligation names Assignor or Assignee explicitly. Attack: Assignor claims a later similar work falls outside assignment — mitigated by narrow, dated Future Works scope. Attack: Assignee sued for infringement by a third party, Assignor denies responsibility — mitigated by Guarantees indemnity clause. Attack: Assignor claims full moral rights waiver in a jurisdiction where that's void — clause self-limits to "fullest extent permitted by applicable law," remaining valid regardless of jurisdiction. No further gaps found. Version 1.0.0 — Self-Review and Red Team passed — Pending Human Legal Review.
